predicate_mappings.job_runner_allocated: a runner is allocated to job {}
predicate_mappings.job_artifact_prepared: the artifact for job {} is prepared
predicate_mappings.job_analysis_passed: the analysis for job {} has passed
predicate_mappings.job_platform_reserved: the platform {} is reserved for job {}
predicate_mappings.job_dependency_reserved: the dependency image {} is reserved for job {}
predicate_mappings.job_accelerator_reserved: the hardware accelerator {} is reserved for job {}
predicate_mappings.job_policy_reserved: the security policy {} is reserved for job {}

predicate_mappings.job_any_stage_started: any stage has started for job {}
predicate_mappings.job_poststage_consolidation_required: post-stage consolidation is required for job {}
predicate_mappings.job_artifact_verified: the artifact for job {} is verified

predicate_mappings.job_finalization_authorized: the finalization is authorized for the job {}
predicate_mappings.trigger_test_profile_compatible: the trigger test profile {} is compatible with the job {}
predicate_mappings.job_test_profile_reserved_by_trigger: the job test profile {} is reserved by the trigger for {}
predicate_mappings.job_controller_ready_for_promotion: the job controller is ready for promotion for {}
predicate_mappings.job_approver_member: {} has an approver who is a member of {}
predicate_mappings.controller_test_profile_reserved: {} has a controller test profile reserved for {}
predicate_mappings.job_artifact_slot_reserved: {} has a reserved job artifact slot {}
predicate_mappings.job_test_profile_compatible: {} is compatible with the test profile {}

register_matrix_job.description: register a matrix job A as a registered job
preconditions: I can only register a matrix job A as a registered job if it is not the case that A is a registered job and it is not the case that the job A is promoted
effects: Once I register a matrix job A as a registered job, it is the case that A is a registered job

allocate_runner_to_job.description: allocate a runner B to a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only allocate a runner B to a matrix job A if it is the case that A is a registered job and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only allocate a runner B to a matrix job A if it is not the case that a runner is allocated to job A
effects: Once I allocate a runner B to a matrix job A, it is the case that A is assigned to runner B and a runner is allocated to job A
Once I allocate a runner B to a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_runner_from_job.description: release a runner B from a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only release a runner B from a matrix job A if it is the case that A is assigned to runner B
I can only release a runner B from a matrix job A if it is not the case that any stage has started for job A and it is not the case that post stage consolidation is required for job A
effects: Once I release a runner B from a matrix job A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a runner B from a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to runner B and it is not the case anymore that a runner is allocated to job A and it is not the case anymore that the artifact for job A is prepared and it is not the case anymore that the analysis for job A has passed and it is not the case anymore that an analysis is requested for the job A and it is not the case anymore that the finalization is authorized for the job A and it is not the case anymore that A requires a secure dataset

reserve_artifact_slot_for_job.description: reserve an artifact storage slot B for a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only reserve an artifact storage slot B for a matrix job A if it is the case that A is a registered job and B is available
effects: Once I reserve an artifact storage slot B for a matrix job A, it is the case that A has a reserved job artifact slot B
Once I reserve an artifact storage slot B for a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_artifact_slot_from_job.description: release an artifact storage slot B from a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only release an artifact storage slot B from a matrix job A if it is the case that A has a reserved job artifact slot B
effects: Once I release an artifact storage slot B from a matrix job A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an artifact storage slot B from a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that A has a reserved job artifact slot B

prepare_artifacts_for_job.description: prepare artifacts for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B
preconditions: I can only prepare artifacts for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B if it is the case that A is a registered job and a runner is allocated to job A and A has a reserved job artifact slot B
I can only prepare artifacts for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B if it is not the case that the artifact for job A is prepared
effects: Once I prepare artifacts for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B, it is the case that the artifact for job A is prepared

invoke_scanner_for_job.description: invoke scanner a scanner worker B for a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only invoke scanner a scanner worker B for a matrix job A if it is the case that A is a registered job and a runner is allocated to job A and B is available
I can only invoke scanner a scanner worker B for a matrix job A if it is not the case that the artifact for job A is prepared
effects: Once I invoke scanner a scanner worker B for a matrix job A, it is the case that the artifact for job A is prepared and an analysis is requested for the job A
Once I invoke scanner a scanner worker B for a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

run_analysis_tool_for_job.description: run an analysis tool C for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B
preconditions: I can only run an analysis tool C for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B if it is the case that the artifact for job A is prepared and a runner is allocated to job A and A has a reserved job artifact slot B and C is available
I can only run an analysis tool C for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B if it is not the case that the analysis for job A has passed
effects: Once I run an analysis tool C for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B, it is the case that the analysis for job A has passed
Once I run an analysis tool C for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B, it is not the case anymore that an analysis is requested for the job A

execute_test_profile_for_job.description: execute a test profile B for a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only execute a test profile B for a matrix job A if it is the case that a runner is allocated to job A and the job test profile B is reserved by the trigger for A
I can only execute a test profile B for a matrix job A if it is not the case that the analysis for job A has passed
effects: Once I execute a test profile B for a matrix job A, it is the case that the analysis for job A has passed
Once I execute a test profile B for a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that an analysis is requested for the job A

reserve_platform_for_job.description: reserve a platform target B for a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only reserve a platform target B for a matrix job A if it is the case that A is a registered job and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a platform target B for a matrix job A, it is the case that the platform B is reserved for job A
Once I reserve a platform target B for a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_platform_from_job.description: release a platform target B from a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only release a platform target B from a matrix job A if it is the case that the platform B is reserved for job A
effects: Once I release a platform target B from a matrix job A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a platform target B from a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that the platform B is reserved for job A

reserve_dependency_image_for_job.description: reserve a dependency image B for a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only reserve a dependency image B for a matrix job A if it is the case that A is a registered job and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a dependency image B for a matrix job A, it is the case that the dependency image B is reserved for job A
Once I reserve a dependency image B for a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_dependency_image_from_job.description: release a dependency image B from a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only release a dependency image B from a matrix job A if it is the case that the dependency image B is reserved for job A
effects: Once I release a dependency image B from a matrix job A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a dependency image B from a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that the dependency image B is reserved for job A

reserve_accelerator_for_job.description: reserve a hardware accelerator B for a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only reserve a hardware accelerator B for a matrix job A if it is the case that A is a registered job and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a hardware accelerator B for a matrix job A, it is the case that the hardware accelerator B is reserved for job A
Once I reserve a hardware accelerator B for a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_accelerator_from_job.description: release a hardware accelerator B from a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only release a hardware accelerator B from a matrix job A if it is the case that the hardware accelerator B is reserved for job A
effects: Once I release a hardware accelerator B from a matrix job A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a hardware accelerator B from a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that the hardware accelerator B is reserved for job A

reserve_security_policy_for_job.description: reserve a security policy B for a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only reserve a security policy B for a matrix job A if it is the case that A is a registered job and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a security policy B for a matrix job A, it is the case that the security policy B is reserved for job A
Once I reserve a security policy B for a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_security_policy_from_job.description: release a security policy B from a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only release a security policy B from a matrix job A if it is the case that the security policy B is reserved for job A
effects: Once I release a security policy B from a matrix job A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a security policy B from a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that the security policy B is reserved for job A

start_stage_execution.description: start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a platform target C and a dependency image D
preconditions: I can only start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a platform target C and a dependency image D if it is the case that a runner is allocated to job A and the platform C is reserved for job A and the dependency image D is reserved for job A and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a platform target C and a dependency image D if it is not the case that any stage has started for job A
effects: Once I start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a platform target C and a dependency image D, it is the case that the stage B has started for job A and any stage has started for job A
Once I start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a platform target C and a dependency image D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

start_stage_with_accelerator_and_dataset.description: start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator C and a secure dataset D
preconditions: I can only start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator C and a secure dataset D if it is the case that a runner is allocated to job A and the hardware accelerator C is reserved for job A and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with D
I can only start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator C and a secure dataset D if it is not the case that any stage has started for job A
effects: Once I start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator C and a secure dataset D, it is the case that the stage B has started for job A and any stage has started for job A and A requires a secure dataset and an analysis is requested for the job A

Once I start execution of a stage B for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator C and a secure dataset D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

consolidate_stage_outputs.description: consolidate outputs of stages for a matrix job A using a platform target B and a dependency image C
preconditions: I can only consolidate outputs of stages for a matrix job A using a platform target B and a dependency image C if it is the case that any stage has started for job A and A requires a secure dataset and the platform B is reserved for job A and the dependency image C is reserved for job A
effects: Once I consolidate outputs of stages for a matrix job A using a platform target B and a dependency image C, it is not the case anymore that A requires a secure dataset and it is not the case anymore that an analysis is requested for the job A

request_manual_approval.description: request manual approval for a matrix job A using a platform target B, a dependency image C, and a human approver D
preconditions: I can only request manual approval for a matrix job A using a platform target B, a dependency image C, and a human approver D if it is the case that the analysis for job A has passed and any stage has started for job A and the platform B is reserved for job A and the dependency image C is reserved for job A and A has an approver who is a member of D

I can only request manual approval for a matrix job A using a platform target B, a dependency image C, and a human approver D if it is not the case that an analysis is requested for the job A and it is not the case that post stage consolidation is required for job A
effects: Once I request manual approval for a matrix job A using a platform target B, a dependency image C, and a human approver D, it is the case that post stage consolidation is required for job A

request_automated_policy_check.description: request automated policy check for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator B, a security policy C, and an automated policy engine D
preconditions: I can only request automated policy check for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator B, a security policy C, and an automated policy engine D if it is the case that the analysis for job A has passed and any stage has started for job A and the hardware accelerator B is reserved for job A and the security policy C is reserved for job A and A has an approver who is a member of D

I can only request automated policy check for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator B, a security policy C, and an automated policy engine D if it is not the case that post stage consolidation is required for job A
effects: Once I request automated policy check for a matrix job A using a hardware accelerator B, a security policy C, and an automated policy engine D, it is the case that post stage consolidation is required for job A and an analysis is requested for the job A

authorize_finalization.description: authorize finalization for a matrix job A with a platform target B and a dependency image C
preconditions: I can only authorize finalization for a matrix job A with a platform target B and a dependency image C if it is the case that post stage consolidation is required for job A and an analysis is requested for the job A and the platform B is reserved for job A and the dependency image C is reserved for job A
effects: Once I authorize finalization for a matrix job A with a platform target B and a dependency image C, it is the case that the finalization is authorized for the job A

Once I authorize finalization for a matrix job A with a platform target B and a dependency image C, it is not the case anymore that an analysis is requested for the job A and it is not the case anymore that the analysis for job A has passed and it is not the case anymore that A requires a secure dataset

finalize_artifacts_with_tool.description: finalize artifacts for a matrix job A using an analysis tool C with an artifact storage slot B
preconditions: I can only finalize artifacts for a matrix job A using an analysis tool C with an artifact storage slot B if it is the case that the finalization is authorized for the job A and post stage consolidation is required for job A and a runner is allocated to job A and A has a reserved job artifact slot B and C is available
I can only finalize artifacts for a matrix job A using an analysis tool C with an artifact storage slot B if it is not the case that the analysis for job A has passed
effects: Once I finalize artifacts for a matrix job A using an analysis tool C with an artifact storage slot B, it is the case that the analysis for job A has passed

verify_artifact_with_slot.description: verify artifact for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B
preconditions: I can only verify artifact for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B if it is the case that post stage consolidation is required for job A and the analysis for job A has passed and A has a reserved job artifact slot B

I can only verify artifact for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B if it is not the case that an analysis is requested for the job A and it is not the case that the artifact for job A is verified
effects: Once I verify artifact for a matrix job A using an artifact storage slot B, it is the case that the artifact for job A is verified

verify_artifact_with_scanner.description: verify artifact for a matrix job A using a scanner worker B
preconditions: I can only verify artifact for a matrix job A using a scanner worker B if it is the case that post stage consolidation is required for job A and the analysis for job A has passed and B is available
I can only verify artifact for a matrix job A using a scanner worker B if it is not the case that an analysis is requested for the job A and it is not the case that the artifact for job A is verified
effects: Once I verify artifact for a matrix job A using a scanner worker B, it is the case that the artifact for job A is verified
Once I verify artifact for a matrix job A using a scanner worker B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

reserve_test_profile_on_controller.description: reserve a test profile B on controller for a matrix job A
preconditions: I can only reserve a test profile B on controller for a matrix job A if it is the case that the artifact for job A is verified and B is available and A is compatible with the test profile B
effects: Once I reserve a test profile B on controller for a matrix job A, it is the case that A has a controller test profile reserved for B
Once I reserve a test profile B on controller for a matrix job A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_test_profile_to_trigger.description: bind a test profile C to a trigger instance A with a controller instance B
preconditions: I can only bind a test profile C to a trigger instance A with a controller instance B if it is the case that A is a registered job and A is a trigger instance and the trigger test profile C is compatible with the job A and B has a controller test profile reserved for C
I can only bind a test profile C to a trigger instance A with a controller instance B if it is not the case that the job test profile C is reserved by the trigger for A
effects: Once I bind a test profile C to a trigger instance A with a controller instance B, it is the case that the job test profile C is reserved by the trigger for A

controller_mark_ready_for_promotion.description: mark a matrix job A as ready for promotion using an artifact storage slot B and an analysis tool C
preconditions: I can only mark a matrix job A as ready for promotion using an artifact storage slot B and an analysis tool C if it is the case that A is a registered job and A is a trigger instance and the analysis for job A has passed and the artifact for job A is verified and A has a reserved job artifact slot B and C is available
I can only mark a matrix job A as ready for promotion using an artifact storage slot B and an analysis tool C if it is not the case that the job controller is ready for promotion for A
effects: Once I mark a matrix job A as ready for promotion using an artifact storage slot B and an analysis tool C, it is the case that the job controller is ready for promotion for A

promote_controller_job.description: promote a matrix job A as a controller job
preconditions: I can only promote a matrix job A as a controller job if it is the case that A is a controller instance and A is a registered job and a runner is allocated to job A and any stage has started for job A and post stage consolidation is required for job A and the artifact for job A is verified and the analysis for job A has passed
I can only promote a matrix job A as a controller job if it is not the case that the job A is promoted
effects: Once I promote a matrix job A as a controller job, it is the case that the job A is promoted

promote_controller_job_with_profile.description: promote a matrix job A with a test profile B as a controller job
preconditions: I can only promote a matrix job A with a test profile B as a controller job if it is the case that A is a trigger instance and A is a registered job and a runner is allocated to job A and any stage has started for job A and post stage consolidation is required for job A and the artifact for job A is verified and the analysis for job A has passed and the job test profile B is reserved by the trigger for A
I can only promote a matrix job A with a test profile B as a controller job if it is not the case that the job A is promoted
effects: Once I promote a matrix job A with a test profile B as a controller job, it is the case that the job A is promoted

promote_trigger_job.description: promote a matrix job A as a trigger job
preconditions: I can only promote a matrix job A as a trigger job if it is the case that A is a trigger instance and A is a registered job and a runner is allocated to job A and any stage has started for job A and post stage consolidation is required for job A and the artifact for job A is verified and the analysis for job A has passed and the job controller is ready for promotion for A
I can only promote a matrix job A as a trigger job if it is not the case that the job A is promoted
effects: Once I promote a matrix job A as a trigger job, it is the case that the job A is promoted

action_nl_templates.register_matrix_job: register matrix job {?matrix_job} as a registered job
action_nl_templates.reserve_artifact_slot_for_job: reserve artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot} for matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.release_artifact_slot_from_job: release artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot} from matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.prepare_artifacts_for_job: prepare artifacts for matrix job {?matrix_job} using artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot}
action_nl_templates.invoke_scanner_for_job: invoke scanner scanner worker {?scanner_worker} for matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.run_analysis_tool_for_job: run analysis tool {?analysis_tool} for matrix job {?matrix_job} using artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot}
action_nl_templates.execute_test_profile_for_job: execute test profile {?test_profile} for matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.reserve_platform_for_job: reserve platform target {?platform_target} for matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.release_platform_from_job: release platform target {?platform_target} from matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.reserve_dependency_image_for_job: reserve dependency image {?dependency_image} for matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.release_dependency_image_from_job: release dependency image {?dependency_image} from matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.reserve_accelerator_for_job: reserve hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator} for matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.release_accelerator_from_job: release hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator} from matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.reserve_security_policy_for_job: reserve security policy {?security_policy} for matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.release_security_policy_from_job: release security policy {?security_policy} from matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.start_stage_execution: start execution of stage {?stage} for matrix job {?matrix_job} using platform target {?platform_target} and dependency image {?dependency_image}
action_nl_templates.start_stage_with_accelerator_and_dataset: start execution of stage {?stage} for matrix job {?matrix_job} using hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator} and secure dataset {?secure_dataset}
action_nl_templates.consolidate_stage_outputs: consolidate outputs of stages for matrix job {?matrix_job} using platform target {?platform_target} and dependency image {?dependency_image}
action_nl_templates.request_manual_approval: request manual approval for matrix job {?matrix_job} using platform target {?platform_target}, dependency image {?dependency_image}, and human approver {?human_approver}
action_nl_templates.request_automated_policy_check: request automated policy check for matrix job {?matrix_job} using hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator}, security policy {?security_policy}, and automated policy engine {?automated_policy_engine}
action_nl_templates.authorize_finalization: authorize finalization for matrix job {?matrix_job} with platform target {?platform_target} and dependency image {?dependency_image}
action_nl_templates.finalize_artifacts_with_tool: finalize artifacts for matrix job {?matrix_job} using analysis tool {?analysis_tool} with artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot}
action_nl_templates.verify_artifact_with_slot: verify artifact for matrix job {?matrix_job} using artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot}
action_nl_templates.verify_artifact_with_scanner: verify artifact for matrix job {?matrix_job} using scanner worker {?scanner_worker}
action_nl_templates.reserve_test_profile_on_controller: reserve test profile {?test_profile} on controller for matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates.bind_test_profile_to_trigger: bind test profile {?test_profile} to trigger instance {?trigger_instance} with controller instance {?controller_instance}
action_nl_templates.controller_mark_ready_for_promotion: mark matrix job {?matrix_job} as ready for promotion using artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot} and analysis tool {?analysis_tool}
action_nl_templates.promote_controller_job: promote matrix job {?matrix_job} as a controller job
action_nl_templates.promote_controller_job_with_profile: promote matrix job {?matrix_job} with test profile {?test_profile} as a controller job
action_nl_templates.promote_trigger_job: promote matrix job {?matrix_job} as a trigger job

predicate_nl_templates.job_runner_allocated: a runner is allocated to job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_artifact_prepared: the artifact for job {?matrix_job} is prepared
predicate_nl_templates.job_analysis_passed: the analysis for job {?matrix_job} has passed
predicate_nl_templates.job_platform_reserved: the platform {?platform_target} is reserved for job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_dependency_reserved: the dependency image {?dependency_image} is reserved for job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_accelerator_reserved: the hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator} is reserved for job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_policy_reserved: the security policy {?security_policy} is reserved for job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_stage_started: the stage {?stage} has started for job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_any_stage_started: any stage has started for job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_poststage_consolidation_required: post-stage consolidation is required for job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_artifact_verified: the artifact for job {?matrix_job} is verified
predicate_nl_templates.job_analysis_requested: an analysis is requested for the job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_finalization_authorized: the finalization is authorized for the job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.trigger_test_profile_compatible: the trigger test profile {?test_profile} is compatible with the job {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_test_profile_reserved_by_trigger: the job test profile {?test_profile} is reserved by the trigger for {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_controller_ready_for_promotion: the job controller is ready for promotion for {?matrix_job}
predicate_nl_templates.job_approver_member: {?matrix_job} has an approver who is a member of {?approval_group}
predicate_nl_templates.controller_test_profile_reserved: {?matrix_job} has a controller test profile reserved for {?test_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.job_artifact_slot_reserved: {?matrix_job} has a reserved job artifact slot {?artifact_storage_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.job_test_profile_compatible: {?matrix_job} is compatible with the test profile {?test_profile}

action_nl_templates_indef.register_matrix_job: register a matrix job {?matrix_job} as a registered job
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_runner_to_job: allocate a runner {?runner} to a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_runner_from_job: release a runner {?runner} from a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_artifact_slot_for_job: reserve an artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot} for a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_artifact_slot_from_job: release an artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot} from a matrix job {?matrix_job}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_platform_from_job: release a platform target {?platform_target} from a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_dependency_image_for_job: reserve a dependency image {?dependency_image} for a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_dependency_image_from_job: release a dependency image {?dependency_image} from a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_accelerator_for_job: reserve a hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator} for a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_accelerator_from_job: release a hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator} from a matrix job {?matrix_job}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_security_policy_from_job: release a security policy {?security_policy} from a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.start_stage_execution: start execution of a stage {?stage} for a matrix job {?matrix_job} using a platform target {?platform_target} and a dependency image {?dependency_image}
action_nl_templates_indef.start_stage_with_accelerator_and_dataset: start execution of a stage {?stage} for a matrix job {?matrix_job} using a hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator} and a secure dataset {?secure_dataset}
action_nl_templates_indef.consolidate_stage_outputs: consolidate outputs of stages for a matrix job {?matrix_job} using a platform target {?platform_target} and a dependency image {?dependency_image}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_manual_approval: request manual approval for a matrix job {?matrix_job} using a platform target {?platform_target}, a dependency image {?dependency_image}, and a human approver {?human_approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_automated_policy_check: request automated policy check for a matrix job {?matrix_job} using a hardware accelerator {?hardware_accelerator}, a security policy {?security_policy}, and an automated policy engine {?automated_policy_engine}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_finalization: authorize finalization for a matrix job {?matrix_job} with a platform target {?platform_target} and a dependency image {?dependency_image}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_artifacts_with_tool: finalize artifacts for a matrix job {?matrix_job} using an analysis tool {?analysis_tool} with an artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_artifact_with_slot: verify artifact for a matrix job {?matrix_job} using an artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_artifact_with_scanner: verify artifact for a matrix job {?matrix_job} using a scanner worker {?scanner_worker}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_test_profile_on_controller: reserve a test profile {?test_profile} on controller for a matrix job {?matrix_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_test_profile_to_trigger: bind a test profile {?test_profile} to a trigger instance {?trigger_instance} with a controller instance {?controller_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.controller_mark_ready_for_promotion: mark a matrix job {?matrix_job} as ready for promotion using an artifact storage slot {?artifact_storage_slot} and an analysis tool {?analysis_tool}
action_nl_templates_indef.promote_controller_job: promote a matrix job {?matrix_job} as a controller job

action_nl_templates_indef.promote_trigger_job: promote a matrix job {?matrix_job} as a trigger job

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a matrix job or a runner or a stage or a dependency image or a platform target or a hardware accelerator or a artifact storage slot or a scanner worker or a test profile or a analysis tool or a secure dataset or a security policy or a approver is also a object
Everything that is a human approver or a automated policy engine is also a approver
Everything that is a controller job or a trigger job is also a matrix job
